title: senecio aequinoctialis
intro: Senecio aequinoctialis, also known as the Equinox Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio aequinoctialis include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
